channel.title: Org Management on Multi-Agent Future
channel.description: Recent content in Org Management on Multi-Agent Future

item.title: How AI Is Flattening the Org Chart and Rewriting Middle Management
item.description: Gartner predicts 20% of companies will use AI to cut half their middle managers by 2026. Here's what's actually happening, who's doing it, and how to prepare.

item.title: AI Is Killing the Annual Performance Review (Finally)
item.description: 58% of companies still use spreadsheets for reviews. AI-powered continuous feedback is replacing the ritual. Here's the real landscape, risks, and how to implement it.
